summary: Completed testing of 3 P1 client features for Bookvia: 1) Reschedule booking from client, 2) Share business (WhatsApp + Copy link), 3) Client payment history. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend features verified.
passed_tests: Backend: PUT /api/bookings/{id}/reschedule endpoint exists and requires auth - PASSED
Backend: PUT /api/bookings/{id}/reschedule returns 404 for non-existent booking - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/payments/my-transactions returns list of transactions - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/payments/my-transactions supports status filter - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/bookings/my returns hours_until_appointment field - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/bookings/my returns deposit_paid field - PASSED
Frontend: UserDashboardPage shows 5 quick actions including 'Mis pagos' with CreditCard icon - PASSED
Frontend: PaymentHistoryPage loads at /payments with data-testid='payment-history-page' - PASSED
Frontend: PaymentHistoryPage shows filter tabs (Todos, Pagados, Pendientes, Reembolsos) - PASSED
Frontend: PaymentHistoryPage shows empty state with CreditCard icon when no transactions - PASSED
Frontend: BusinessProfilePage has Share button (data-testid='share-button') - PASSED
Frontend: Share button opens dropdown menu with WhatsApp and Copy link options - PASSED
Frontend: Copy link shows toast 'Enlace copiado al portapapeles' - PASSED
Frontend: UserBookingsPage loads at /bookings with tabs (Próximas/Pasadas) - PASSED
Frontend: UserBookingsPage shows empty state 'Sin citas próximas' when no bookings - PASSED

bugs_fixed.issue: Frontend used tx.amount but backend TransactionResponse returns amount_total
bugs_fixed.fix: Updated to use tx.amount_total || tx.amount || 0 for backwards compatibility

critical_code_review_comments: Reschedule button correctly shows only for confirmed bookings >24h away (UserBookingsPage.jsx lines 353-364)
Reschedule modal shows green deposit notice when deposit_paid is true (UserBookingsPage.jsx lines 619-626)
Share button uses navigator.share on mobile, fallback to dropdown on desktop (BusinessProfilePage.jsx lines 344-411)
PaymentHistoryPage correctly handles empty state with CreditCard icon (lines 136-149)
UserDashboardPage has 5 quick actions with correct icons and colors (lines 127-152)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. User 'cliente@bookvia.com' has 0 bookings and 0 transactions, which correctly shows empty states.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 client features tested: 1) Reschedule - button only appears for confirmed bookings >24h away, modal has calendar + slots + deposit notice. 2) Share business - dropdown with WhatsApp + Copy link on desktop. 3) Payment history - /payments page with filters and empty state. User 'cliente@bookvia.com' has no bookings/transactions so empty states were verified. To test reschedule flow end-to-end, need to create a confirmed booking >24h in the future.

reschedule_booking.backend_endpoint: PUT /api/bookings/{id}/reschedule with query params new_date, new_time
reschedule_booking.frontend_button: Blue 'Reagendar' button with RefreshCw icon, only shows for confirmed bookings >24h away
reschedule_booking.frontend_modal: CalendarWidget + time slots + 'Confirmar nueva fecha' button
reschedule_booking.deposit_notice: Green notice 'Tu anticipo ya está pagado. No necesitas pagar de nuevo.' when deposit_paid=true

payment_history.summary_card: Shows total paid when transactions exist
